texto: It is tragic the way fearful people put all of their fears and insecurities into others
autor: the way they strangle their dreams — often in the name of love.
explicacao: Citação de the way they strangle their dreams — often in the name of love. sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “It is tragic the way fearful people put all of their fears and insecurities into others” articula reflexao, bryant-mcgill, tragic em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
